title: Boundaryeohatchet78/cli-455
summary: 阿里云百炼 CLI 是一款专为 AI Agent 框架设计的官方 Model Studio CLI，提供模型管理、搜索、多模态交互和工作流处理等能力，通过结构化工具调用实现，适用于 Python 语言。
description: Official Model Studio CLI（阿里云百炼 CLI）built for AI Agent frameworks, exposing models, search, multimodal, and workflow capabilities as structured tool calls.
